notes: 2026-07-22: theaibolt posted_urls re-verified via Apify (200-limit sweep, 142 items returned / 143 known) - identical to prior sweep, zero new posts, zero pruning needed. The 22 clips seeded earlier today in clips_log (from airesearches/evolving.ai/thewizeai/theaipage) were audited and marked disqualified: all are AI-generated/CGI video with no real speaker (speaker field empty on every entry), failing the hard FORMAT gate - they were NOT promoted to backlog.json. Ran the two untried levers flagged 2026-07-09: X/Twitter search (api-ninja/x-twitter-advanced-search) and direct speaker-name + cross-industry keyword search on Instagram (data-slayer/instagram-search-reels), both via 3 parallel subagents. Found 14 new qualifying-or-review-tier URLs, appended above. found_urls now includes every URL ever surfaced as a 1M+ candidate (available or review status) across all runs; the found-then-rejected 22 AI-generated clips are tracked only in clips_log, not found_urls, since they never qualified. See data/backlog.json 'status' field for the full run narrative. MERGED 2026-07-24: two concurrent discovery runs on the same day, union-merged. Run A (dedup-only resweep): theaibolt resweep unchanged (143/143). First-ever @theaiaxon dedup pass (STEP 1b): published-reels scrape returned 1 post (Sam Altman/Tucker Carlson, tracked in backlog.json theaiaxon_published_exclusions, not added to found_urls since it is @theaiaxon's own repost not a source clip); Metricool scheduled-posts returned 0. Ran 6 X-search + 5 IG-search queries across untried Tier2/3 speakers and cross-industry fields (medicine, law, music, economics, sports) - all 11 Apify runs succeeded with no quota errors, but zero results cleared the 1M-view+real-speaker+on-topic bar, so nothing new was appended to found_urls or clips_log by this run. Run B (net-new discovery, union-merged into this record): theaibolt posted_urls re-verified via Apify (200-limit sweep, 142/143 items) - identical to prior sweep, zero new posts. theaiaxon dedup (STEP 1b) also run this cycle with the same clean result (1 published reel, 0 scheduled). 3 parallel discovery lanes (X/Twitter search, IG cross-industry keyword search, mega-podcast post-2026-07-09 recency check) added 22 new qualifying-or-review URLs, now merged into found_urls above. See data/backlog.json 'status' field for full run narrative. RUN #4 2026-07-24: theaibolt resweep unchanged (143/142, zero new). theaiaxon dedup clean (1 published reel, 0 scheduled, no errors). 4 parallel subagent lanes (X-search AI researchers/execs, X-search cross-industry, IG mega-podcast recency, X-search finance/entertainment) added 11 new qualifying-or-review URLs to found_urls/clips_log (10 qualified, 1 review - Snoop Dogg at the 1M line with AI as a secondary topic). IG mega-podcast lane found zero new (exhaustion holds); 3 broken handles corrected (@tferriss->@timferriss, @modernwisdompodcast->@chriswillx, @nikhilkamathofficial->@nikhilkamathcio) but all empty; @20vc still unresolvable.
